data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_Introduction: Hi, I'm the TRADER.\nWant to trade decorations with me?
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_TradedAlready: But we've traded decorations already,\nyou and I.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_MenuPrompt: If you see any decorative item that\nyou want of mine, speak up.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_DontWantAnything: You don't want anything?\nI feel unwanted...
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_ItemOnceBelongedTo: That decorative item once belonged\nto {STR_VAR_1}.\pDo you want it?
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_YouDontHaveDecorations: Uh... Wait a second. You don't have a\nsingle piece of decoration!
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_PickDecorationYoullTrade: Okay, pick the decoration that you'll\ntrade to me.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_FeelUnwanted2: You won't trade with me?\nI feel unwanted...
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_NoRoomForThis: You've got all the {STR_VAR_2}S that can\nbe stored. You've no room for this.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_SoWellTrade: Okay, so we'll trade my {STR_VAR_3}\nfor your {STR_VAR_2}?
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_InUseYouCantTradeIt: That piece of decoration is in use.\nYou can't trade it.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_ThenWellTrade: Then we'll trade!\nI'll send my decoration to your PC.
data/text/trader.inc.gTextTrader_ICantTradeThatOneAway: Oops! Sorry!\nThat's a really rare piece of decoration.\lI can't trade that one away!\pCan I interest you in something else?
